positive: A detailed, vintage botanical engraving style illustration of a fantastical hybrid flower (like a bioluminescent orchid) intertwined with delicate gold leaf accents. The composition should be framed like an antique scientific plate, using muted greens, creams, and deep jewel tones. --ar 4:5
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, digital painting, harsh lines
